rows.label: qev025904_MSG0001
rows.name:
Aah... Aaah...
Avatar of God, that form is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025904_MSG0002
rows.name:
This is truly my god...
The true form bestowed by Mother Fortun...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025904_MSG0003
rows.name:
Fraisie... Witness the power of the God of Miracles
from right there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025904_MSG0004
rows.name: Why... How could mere Earthlings push me this far...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025904_MSG0005
rows.name:
Tch...! It can't end like this...
Mother Fortun...
Please lend me your power![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025904_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Chase after it!
If we don't finish it off here, it will only spawn
a second or third Fraisie...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025904_MSG0007
rows.name:
Please end this tragedy here and now
and avenge the Ma-non who were murdered![ST:wait ]
